rationale: Proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to educator criminal history record reviews under Educ. Code §22.0831. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 22.0831. NATIONAL CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORD INFORMATION REVIEW OF CERTIFIED EDUCATORS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns educator certification background checks, not property tax exemptions.
